creator: nacai@iname.com
text:
I have received the gqmpeg patch to follow its latest version
0.6.2 from John Baldwin.

I attach uuencoded patch and the plain text.

Yukihiro Nakai
--------------

diff -ruN gqmpeg.orig/Makefile gqmpeg/Makefile
--- gqmpeg.orig/Makefile        Mon Jun  7 15:32:29 1999
+++ gqmpeg/Makefile     Mon Jun  7 15:33:39 1999
@@ -1,12 +1,12 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:   gqmpeg
-# Version required:    0.6.1
+# Version required:    0.6.2
 # Date Created:                28 Oct 1998
 # Whom:                        Vanilla Pooh Shu <vanilla@FreeBSD.ORG>
 #
 # $Id: Makefile,v 1.14 1999/05/29 04:07:41 steve Exp $
 #

-DISTNAME=      gqmpeg-0.6.1
+DISTNAME=      gqmpeg-0.6.2
 CATEGORIES=    audio
 MASTER_SITES=  http://gqview.netpedia.net/ \
                http://www.geocities.com/SiliconValley/Haven/5235/
diff -ruN gqmpeg.orig/files/md5 gqmpeg/files/md5
--- gqmpeg.orig/files/md5       Mon Jun  7 15:32:29 1999
+++ gqmpeg/files/md5    Mon Jun  7 15:33:19 1999
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (gqmpeg-0.6.1.src.tgz) = 4d480e6c1b6e2be4e0768dfa4912882b
+MD5 (gqmpeg-0.6.2.src.tgz) = eca73e9511f22c338e3133c9abc68c2c
